response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience and notable geospatial project contributions via GISCollective and Open Green Map, which align with the role’s geospatial focus, but lacks direct C++/Rust experience in commercial routing or navigation pipelines, and shows no evidence of distributed systems or routing tile optimization work critical to the role.
strengths: Demonstrated geospatial platform development via open-source GIS projects
Strong track record in building scalable, event-driven systems across languages
Proven ability to learn and contribute across diverse tech stacks and domains
concerns: No visible commercial experience with C++ or Rust in routing or navigation systems
Lack of evidence in distributed systems, fault tolerance, or routing tile optimization
Primary language focus is TypeScript/Node.js/DLang, not the required C++ core
